title: lippia micromera var. helleri
intro: Lippia micromera var. helleri, also known as Heller's Lippia, is a plant species that belongs to the Verbenaceae family. It is a shrub native to tropical Africa, valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, coughs, and respiratory infections, as well as to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. Lippia micromera var. helleri can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
